---
title: "NeoIPC Reference Report"
format: html
editor: visual
echo: false
params:
  reportingPeriodFrom: NULL
  reportingPeriodTo: NULL
  birthWeightFrom: NULL
  birthWeightTo: NULL
  gestationalAgeFrom: NULL
  gestationalAgeTo: NULL
  countryFilter: NULL
  hospitalFilter: NULL
  testUnitFilter: true
  defaultPatientFilter: true
  token: NULL
---

```{r Pre-Setup}
locale = "en"
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = "en_GB.utf8"))
trnsl <- list(
  singleBirth <- "Single birth",
  twins <- "Twins",
  tripletsOrMore <- "Triplet or more"
)
```

{{< include _setup.qmd >}}

## Quarto

Quarto enables you to weave together content and executable code into a finished document. To learn more about Quarto see <https://quarto.org>.
